entryRequirements.visaNote: Same national Thailand rules as Bangkok/Phuket.

mainSystems: Songthaew (baht buses — main local transport, shared routes)
transportInfo.note: Baht buses run fixed routes along the main roads and are the cheapest way to get around — flag one down and confirm the fare/destination before boarding.

publicHolidays2026: Same national Thai holidays as Bangkok.
majorEventsNote: Songkran here is especially large-scale and tourist-oriented compared to more local celebrations elsewhere in Thailand.
